score.description: Overall quality of the journey: how smoothly the app let the user succeed.

completion.description: Did the user accomplish what the story asked?

assessment.description: Step count vs. what the task should take; backtracking; hesitation.

wasted_steps.description: Steps that did not advance the task.

step.description: Step number the finding refers to, if specific.

findings.description: Free-form UX/quality observations, e.g. 'the error message after an invalid card is blank'.

summary.description: Two or three sentences a developer reads in the report.

question.description: The report question, quoted verbatim from the case.

answer.description: The answer, grounded in the trajectory.

evidence_steps.description: Step numbers that evidence the answer.

report.description: Answers to the case's report questions, one entry per question, in order. Present only when the case declares report questions.
